description: Duncan from 0x discusses Dex aggregation, explaining its importance in achieving optimal swap prices by utilizing multiple Dex platforms. He highlights the complexities involved in executing multi-hop and multiplex strategies for effective trading, particularly on Solana. The presentation emphasizes the need for specialized skills in Dex aggregation to leverage liquidity effectively.
topic_summary: Duncan introduces Dex aggregation, detailing how it combines multi-hop and multiplex strategies to secure the best swap prices across different Dex platforms. He outlines the challenges of implementing these strategies on Solana compared to Ethereum, and discusses the upcoming 0x API V2 for Solana.
